agentDelete.title: Delete agent?
agentDelete.description: This will permanently delete the agent and all its data. This cannot be undone.

workspaceDialog.title: New workspace
workspaceDialog.githubDescription: Import a workspace template from GitHub. This creates a workspace with all its agents ready to use.

assistant.title: Your agents
assistant.body: Every agent in this workspace lives here. Switch between them with one click.

board.title: The agent's workspace
board.body: This is where the selected agent works. Everything you see on the right is scoped to that agent.

newMission.title: Start a new chat
newMission.body: Click here to open a fresh conversation. Each one becomes a mission card.

tabActivity.title: Activity
tabActivity.body: The board of every conversation with this agent. Running, needs you, done.

tabRoutines.title: Routines
tabRoutines.body: Schedule work to run in the background. Useful for daily briefs and recurring tasks.

tabFiles.title: Files
tabFiles.body: Docs your assistant can read or share with you. Drop anything here for context.

tabJobDescription.title: Job Description
tabJobDescription.body: Your assistant's standing instructions. Edit any time to change how it behaves.

missionControl.title: Mission Control
missionControl.body: When you add more agents, this becomes the single board across all of them. One place to see everything.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.body: Tools your agents can use, like Gmail and Calendar. Connections live here, shared across all your agents.

appTour.title: Replay the tour
appTour.body: Forget how something works? Click this any time to run the tour again.

newAgent.title: Add another agent
newAgent.body: You can spin up another agent here any time, or keep working with the one you have.

agentStore.title: Pick where to start
agentStore.body: Choose Start from scratch for a blank agent, or pick one of ours from the store and tweak it to fit.

outro.title: Now go build something amazing
outro.body: That's the whole tour. The rest is on you, have fun.

agentUpdate.title: Agent update available
agentUpdate.descriptionSuffix: The update has been downloaded. Reload to apply it.

authReconnect.heading: Houston, we have a problem
authReconnect.body: Your {{provider}} session expired. Sign in again to keep your agents running.

providerReconnect.title: Session expired
providerReconnect.body: Your {{provider}} connection ended, this happens from time to time. Sign back in and you're good to go.
providerReconnect.launchError: Could not open sign-in. Try again.

toolRuntimeError.title: Something got stuck
toolRuntimeError.body: A local tool did not start correctly. Try again, and report it if this keeps happening.

modelUnsupported.title: Your ChatGPT plan doesn't include GPT-5.5 Codex
modelUnsupported.body: Switch to GPT-5.5 to continue. The Codex variant is only available on some ChatGPT plans (Plus, Pro, Team), not on Business or Enterprise.
modelUnsupported.switchErrorDescription: Open the model picker and choose GPT-5.5 manually.

updateChecker.title: Houston, we have an update!
updateChecker.availableDescription: Version {{version}} is ready. You're on v{{currentVersion}}.
updateChecker.ready: Update installed. Relaunch Houston to finish.
updateChecker.errorInstall: Houston couldn't install the update. Try again in a moment.
updateChecker.errorRelaunch: Update installed, but Houston couldn't relaunch itself. Relaunch manually or try again.
updateChecker.noDetails: This update includes the latest fixes and improvements.

naming.tagline: Pick a color and name your agent

aiAssist.cardDescription: Answer a few quick questions and we'll write your agent's instructions
aiAssist.generatedHelper: Review and edit the instructions below, then continue when ready
aiAssist.errorDescription: Could not generate instructions. Make sure your AI provider is connected and try again.

form.focusLabel: What should this agent help with?
form.focusRequired: Pick a focus area to continue
form.askFirstLabel: Should it ask questions before answering?
form.askFirstHint: The agent will clarify your request before diving in
form.extraPlaceholder: Any other preferences, rules, or context for this agent...

aiReview.instructionsHelper: Review and edit the instructions below

aiIntegrations.stepDescription: These apps work well with your agent. Connect them now or do it later from the Integrations tab.
aiIntegrations.notInstalledNote: You can connect integrations from the Integrations tab after creating your agent.
aiIntegrations.needsAuthNote: Sign in to Composio to connect apps now, or do it after creating your agent.

aiRoutine.stepDescription: Based on what you described, this agent can run on a schedule by itself. Edit anything before you turn it on.
aiRoutine.promptLabel: What it should do each time
aiRoutine.consentScheduled: It runs by itself on a schedule.
aiRoutine.consentUsage: Every run uses AI, so it counts toward your usage.
aiRoutine.consentNeedsApp: If it uses an app, that app must be connected or the routine can't run.
aiRoutine.laterNote: You can create, change, or turn off routines anytime in the agent's Routines tab.

rateLimited.title: Hit a rate limit
rateLimited.body: The {{provider}} API is throttling requests. Wait a moment and try again.
rateLimited.bodyWithRetry: The {{provider}} API is throttling requests. Try again in {{seconds}}s.

quotaExhausted.title: Out of capacity
quotaExhausted.body: Your {{provider}} plan reached its quota. Upgrade or switch to a different provider to keep going.

modelUnavailable.title: Model not available
modelUnavailable.body: {{model}} is not available on your {{provider}} account.

unauthenticated.title: Sign in to {{provider}} again
unauthenticated.bodyTokenExpired: Your {{provider}} session expired. Reconnect to continue.
unauthenticated.bodyNoCredentials: Houston needs you to sign in to {{provider}} before it can answer.
unauthenticated.bodyInvalidApiKey: The {{provider}} API key Houston has is no longer valid. Update it and try again.
unauthenticated.bodyTokenRevoked: Your {{provider}} access was revoked. Sign in again to continue.
unauthenticated.bodyUnknown: Houston could not authenticate with {{provider}}. Reconnect and try again.

networkUnreachable.title: Cannot reach {{provider}}
networkUnreachable.body: Houston could not reach the {{provider}} API. Check your internet, then try again.

providerInternal.title: {{provider}} is having a problem
providerInternal.body: The {{provider}} API returned an error on its side. Try again in a moment.

sessionResumeMissing.title: Session restarted
sessionResumeMissing.body: The previous {{provider}} conversation could not be reopened, so Houston restarted it. Your message was sent again and the assistant is responding below.

malformedResponse.title: Got a broken response
malformedResponse.body: The {{provider}} response was not readable. Try again, this is usually temporary.

spawnFailed.title: Could not start {{provider}}
spawnFailed.body: Houston could not start {{provider}}. Try reinstalling, then report it if it keeps happening.

unknown.title: Something unexpected happened
unknown.body: Houston could not classify this {{provider}} error. Report it so we can teach Houston to handle it next time.

palette.title: Command palette
palette.empty: Nothing matched. Try a different word.

cheatsheet.title: Keyboard shortcuts
cheatsheet.description: Run Houston without touching the mouse.

feedback.title: Send feedback
feedback.description: Crash data reaches us automatically. This is for everything else: a feature that feels off, a flow that broke, an idea.
feedback.successWithId: Mission control is on it. Reference: {{id}}
